title: iva axillaris
intro: Iva axillaris, also known as the winged or winged iva, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to North and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iva axillaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and ease respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Iva axillaris can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
